scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const distDir = path.join(__dirname, 'dist'); if (!fs.existsSync(distDir)) fs.mkdirSync(distDir); const srcDir = path.join(__dirname, 'programming', 'javascript-html-css', 'workspace', 'src'); const files = fs.readdirSync(srcDir); files.forEach(file => { if (!fs.lstatSync(path.join(srcDir, file)).isDirectory()) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(srcDir, file), path.join(distDir, file)); } });"
